name: Guangdong Kingshine Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Kingshine Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells printed circuit boards in China. Its products are primarily used in mobile terminal equipment, automotive electronics, network communication equipment, household appliances, office equipment, new energy equipment, industrial security, medical electronics, artificial intelligence, and other fields. The company also exports its products to the United States, Canada, Australia, Brazil, Poland, Italy, Spain, Africa, India, Singapore, Malaysia, South Korea, Japan, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Huizhou, China.
